videos.headline: Book finds the hole for 3rd rushing TD
videos.description: Fighting Irish QB Ian Book punches it in for his third rushing touchdown in his debut replacing Brandon Wimbush as the starter.

videos.headline: Wake Forest recovers Notre Dame's fumble
videos.description: Wake Forest's defense recovers the Notre Dame fumble, leading to a FG.

videos.headline: Jafar Armstrong run for 30 yds for a TD (Justin Yoon KICK)
videos.description: J. Armstrong run for 30 yds for a TD, (J. Yoon KICK)

videos.headline: Book finds Wright for Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Fighting Irish QB Ian Book connects with Brock Wright for a three-yard TD against Wake Forest Demon Deacons.

videos.headline: Finke comes up big on 52-yard punt return
videos.description: Chris Finke returns Wake Forest's punt 52 yards, putting Notre Dame in scoring range.

videos.headline: Jones Jr. punches in Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Tony Jones Jr. rushes four yards to the end zone to extend Notre Dame's lead over Wake Forest 21-6 in the second quarter.

videos.headline: Wake Forest answers Notre Dame with TD
videos.description: The Demon Deacons capitalize on a Notre Dame's 15-yard pass interference penalty with a 2-yard TD run from Matt Colburn.

videos.headline: Young's big gain leads to Notre Dame score
videos.description: Michael Young nearly takes a short pass all the way for a touchdown, then QB Ian Book runs it in 2 yards to extend the lead 28-13.

videos.headline: Claypool lays out for the Fighting Irish TD
videos.description: Chase Claypool snags the pass from QB Ian Book for a 7-yard touchdown in the third quarter.

videos.headline: Jafar Armstrong run for 1 yd for a TD (Justin Yoon KICK)
videos.description: J. Armstrong run for 1 yd for a TD, (J. Yoon KICK)

videos.headline: Book picks up 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Notre Dame QB Ian Book fakes the handoff and finds the end zone for his second rushing touchdown of the game.

videos.headline: Wake Forest QB scores 23-yd TD
videos.description: Kendall Hinton makes Notre Dame defenders miss on his 23-yard run to the end zone in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: Newman runs in TD for Wake Forest
videos.description: Jamie Newman tries to close the gap with Notre Dame with a 15-yard TD in the fourth quarter.
